body:
cc @AlexisRenchon @juliasloan25 
Updates to use ClimaComms v0.6, and ClimaAtmos 0.26.0

Current known issues /updates (in ClimaAtmos)
(1) SSPKnoth does not work with `DiagnosticEDMFX`
(2) `CAM_SE` is now the default hyperdiffusion in ClimaAtmos. 

Supersedes https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaCoupler.jl/pull/854
title: Use ClimaComms0.6, ClimaAtmos0.26, and update ClimaEarth experiments

body: Fixes a bug spotted by @juliasloan25 in the assignment of exchange coefficients in the `FluxCalculator`.
title: Bugfix: beta, drag coefficient assignment
